name: Princess Ariel Doll Kids' Pillow Buddy - The Disney Collection by Pillowfort™
description: This Princess Ariel Doll Kids' Pillow Buddy from The Disney Collection by Pillowfort™ adds a touch of magic to your kid's bed. Made of recycled PET fabric, this figural pillow buddy doll is designed as Ariel in her human form, wearing a gauze dress. Standing 20.25 inches high, it makes a fun pairing with The Little Mermaid- or Disney-themed sheets and pillowcases on their bed.
